prompt: Create blog post about why React Server Components are important

assertions.name: both_versions_exist
assertions.description: Both Vietnamese and English files are created

assertions.name: concept_style_used
assertions.description: Uses concept explanation style with problem-first approach and subsection numbering (1.1, 1.2)

assertions.name: problem_solution_narrative
assertions.description: Starts with traditional React problems, then introduces RSC solution

assertions.name: has_diagrams
assertions.description: Includes visual aids like ASCII diagrams or workflow representations

assertions.name: has_code_examples
assertions.description: Contains before/after code comparisons showing RSC usage

assertions.name: covers_all_concepts
assertions.description: Covers: problems, RSC benefits, how it works, 'use client' directive

assertions.name: proper_structure
assertions.description: Has engaging hook, progressive disclosure, and clear sections
